name: webnovel-writer
description: Long-form webnovel writing system with skills, agents, data chain, and RAG support.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, write, review, and track long webnovels
interface.longDescription: Webnovel Writer provides Codex skills for long-form fiction planning, drafting, review, amendment, querying, learning, and dashboard inspection, backed by a Python story data chain and RAG-ready project state.
defaultPrompt: Revise a committed chapter with outline-first fact checks
